test_focal_event_exists.description: Validates that the focal event (Rodriguez Quinceanera) is discoverable in calendar

test_focal_event_date_is_october_17.description: Confirms focal event date is October 17, 2026

test_inventory_current_file_exists.description: Validates current inventory file (v2.1) exists and is the most recent version

test_inventory_stale_v20_exists.description: Confirms stale inventory version (v2.0) exists to test temporal revision handling

test_current_inventory_modified_after_st.description: Critical: Current inventory must be newer than stale version to test agent's version selection

test_current_quote_exists.description: Critical: Current quote from Premium Event Linens ($285) must exist

test_current_quote_pending_status.description: Current quote must be in Pending status (not Closed/Accepted)

test_current_quote_expiry_date.description: Current quote must have expiry date of October 15, 2026

test_stale_quote_pricing.description: Old stale quote at $195 must exist to test quote selection logic

test_sofia_helper_window_345_to_615.description: Sofia's helper availability window must be 3:45 PM - 6:15 PM

test_setup_window_1000_to_1200.description: Setup window must be 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM, before Sofia's availability

test_client_approval_email_exists.description: Critical: Client approval email from Mariana must exist

test_client_theme_approval_content.description: Critical: Client email must contain Modern Elegance theme and no-substitution mandate

test_vendor_quote_email_exists.description: Critical: Premium Event Linens email must exist in Gmail

test_vendor_quote_email_content_285.description: Critical: Vendor email must contain $285 quote amount

test_budget_internal_note_400_remaining.description: Internal budget note must show $400 remaining for supplies

test_catering_expense_already_paid.description: Validates catering expense of $400 is already committed and covered

test_photography_expense_already_paid.description: Validates photography expense of $350 is already committed and covered

test_storage_assessment_email_exists.description: Internal storage assessment email must exist

test_storage_assessment_28_usable.description: Critical: Storage email must mention 28 usable napkins (photo evidence)

test_storage_assessment_8_damaged.description: Critical: Storage email must mention 8 water-stained damaged napkins

test_borrowed_item_email_exists.description: Email about borrowed gold chargers must exist

test_borrowed_item_3pm_constraint.description: Borrowed chargers must be constrained to 3 PM delivery (during event, after setup)

test_ralph_helper_email_exists.description: Email about Sofia helper availability must exist

test_helper_email_sofia_name.description: Helper email must mention Sofia by name

test_helper_email_345_to_615.description: Helper email must specify 3:45 PM to 6:15 PM window

test_rodriguez_customer_exists.description: Rodriguez customer record must exist in QuickBooks

test_premium_event_linens_vendor_active.description: Premium Event Linens vendor must be active in QuickBooks

test_fk_event_to_calendar.description: Event calendar_id must reference valid calendar (FK check)

test_fk_estimate_to_customer.description: Estimate CustomerRef must reference valid customer (FK check)

test_fk_estimate_to_vendor.description: Estimate must reference correct vendor by name

test_trap_invalid_events_present.description: Critical negative: Trap events (cancelled helper, tentative focal) must exist for agent to filter correctly

test_no_tentative_focal_event_used.description: PLACEHOLDER - consolidated into test_trap_invalid_events_present (removed from calculation)

test_no_wrong_period_event_used.description: Negative weight: August 2026 vendor demo must exist in data (agent should exclude)

test_trap_outlook_contains_no_answer_val.description: Critical negative: Outlook service must contain zero Rodriguez/napkin values

test_trap_dropbox_contains_no_current_fi.description: Moderate negative: Dropbox service must contain no current (October 2026) event files
